title: Settings
requestDelayHelp: Minimum wait after each LLM API call completes before the next one starts. Helps avoid provider rate limits (HTTP 429). Default 0 means no delay.
insightHelp: Provider and model used for the timeline's Summarize and Review. Leave on Auto to borrow a suitable agent's provider. Choosing a provider that allows browser (CORS) requests avoids the timeline being blocked.
